certified_capabilities: Reconstructs referenced execution-ready replay before request creation.
Verifies authorization, packet, candidate, handoff, approval, chain, replay, authority, and hash continuity.
Persists invocation request evidence, classification, artifact, and result.
Supports Filesystem Worker, Monitoring Worker, and approved Trading Improvement acceptance flows.

validation_commands.command: python -m pytest tests/test_worker_invocation_request_runtime_v1.py tests/test_execution_authorization_runtime_v1.py tests/test_ready_for_dispatch_runtime_v1.py tests/test_worker_runtime_v1.py tests/test_dispatch_runtime_v1.py tests/test_worker_invocation_runtime_v1.py tests/test_execution_runtime_v1.py tests/test_result_runtime_v1.py tests/test_execution_request_runtime_v1.py tests/test_implementation_plan_to_execution_request_runtime_v1.py

remaining_gap_before_first_worker_assign: A governed Worker assignment runtime must consume WORKER_INVOCATION_REQUEST_ARTIFACT_V1.
Assignment must validate registered Worker identity, role compatibility, target Worker family compatibility, allowed outputs, forbidden operations, replay continuity, and authority continuity.
Dispatch, invocation, execution, result validation, post-execution replay review, and termination remain separate downstream certifications.
